mapper.select:
SELECT id, main_domain, task_name, keyword1, keyword2, keyword3, lead_department, lead_person, planned_start_date, planned_end_date FROM key_task WHERE deleted = 0
AND main_domain LIKE CONCAT('%', #{mainDomain}, '%')
AND lead_department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{leadDepartment}, '%')
AND lead_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{leadPerson}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, main_domain, task_name, specific_measures, expected_effect, keyword1, keyword2, keyword3, deliverables, lead_department, lead_person, planned_start_date, planned_end_date, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by FROM key_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT lead_department FROM key_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND lead_department IS NOT NULL ORDER BY lead_department
SELECT DISTINCT lead_person FROM key_task WHERE deleted = 0 AND lead_person IS NOT NULL ORDER BY lead_person
